findings.title: ROP chain assembled through stack pivot but JIT page and privileged execution unproven
findings.statement: The parser OOB write reaches a vtable pointer. ROPgadget found 47 gadgets surviving the CFI landing-pad policy after filtering indirect branches. A stack-pivot gadget (xchg rax, rsp; ret) chains into a mprotect(addr, 0x1000, PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE|PROT_EXEC) sequence using pop rdi; pop rsi; pop rdx gadgets. The chain is complete through the stack pivot, but the JIT page address is randomized at runtime and no info leak was found to resolve it. Without the JIT target, the mprotect call cannot be aimed and privileged execution cannot be demonstrated.

evidence.summary: exploit_ropgadget --filter 'jmp|call': 47 CFI-surviving gadgets including register-control and stack-pivot sequences
disasm_radare2_gadgets confirmed xchg rax, rsp; ret pivot; chain assembled through mprotect setup
